info.name: Helwan Club API
info.description: Complete API collection for Helwan Club Backend - Staff Management, Sports, Membership, Registration, and Member Administration

request.description: Authenticate user with email and password. Returns JWT token.
First-time login for staff using national_id as both username and password
Change email and password for staff on first login
Get all available staff types (no authentication required)
Register a new staff member. Only ADMIN can register EXECUTIVE_MANAGER.
Get paginated list of all staff members
Get detailed information about a specific staff member
Update staff member information
Get all available privilege packages
Assign privilege packages to a staff member
Get computed privileges (packages + grants - revokes)
Grant a specific privilege to a staff member
Revoke a privilege from a staff member
Get activity logs for a staff member

body.raw:
{
  "name_en": "Football",
  "name_ar": "كرة القدم",
  "description_en": "Team sport played with a spherical ball",
  "description_ar": "رياضة جماعية تلعب بكرة كروية",
  "category": "team_sport",
  "max_participants": 22,
  "min_age": 6,
  "max_age": null,
  "equipment_required": "Ball, Goals, Field",
  "status": "active"
}

request.description: Create a new sport (Manager: active, Specialist: pending)
Get all sports with optional filters
Get detailed information about a sport
Update sport information
Approve or reject a sport (Manager only)
Delete a sport (Manager only)
Toggle sport active/inactive status (Manager only)
Get all membership plans (public endpoint)
Get specific membership plan details
Step 1: Create basic member account
Single-step registration for working members
Get salary brackets for membership pricing
Get list of available professions
Calculate membership price based on salary and dependents
Select sports/teams for a team member
Get team member registration status
Review all team members (Sport Manager/Specialist only)
Get all members (requires VIEW_MEMBERS privilege)
Get member details (requires VIEW_MEMBERS privilege)
Create new member (requires CREATE_MEMBER privilege)
Update member information (requires UPDATE_MEMBER privilege)
Change member status (requires CHANGE_MEMBER_STATUS privilege)
Get all membership plans (requires VIEW_MEMBERSHIP_PLANS privilege)

body.raw:
{
  "name_en": "Premium Membership",
  "name_ar": "العضوية المميزة",
  "description_en": "Full access to all facilities",
  "description_ar": "وصول كامل لجميع المرافق",
  "price": 1500.00,
  "duration_months": 12,
  "member_type_id": 2,
  "benefits": ["Pool", "Gym", "Tennis Courts"]
}

request.description: Create membership plan (requires CREATE_MEMBERSHIP_PLAN privilege)
Assign membership plan (requires ASSIGN_MEMBERSHIP_PLAN_TO_MEMBER privilege)
